title: View management in a board with several views

posts.author: ftremblay (Francois PT)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I have some requests / questions regarding the way we could manage the views within a board.

Situation : I have a project board where a lot (>80) of peoples can consult. They can also create views for their own purpose.

Issues : I would like to have a way to :

  1. Change the name of the default view

  2. Have a way to reorganize the view order (a bit like what we can do with the tabs in Excel)

  3. Know who created a view. This action is not visible in the board activity. Sometime, I need to know who created a view so I can contact that person if I need to do some housekeeping.

image1351×177 22.5 KB

Thanks !
FPT
